_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national autopilot
_meta.note: CA federal batch — evidence-finalize 4 sitting CA Democratic US Reps (Levin CA-49, Peters CA-50, Jacobs CA-51, Vargas CA-52). Federal tier (50 cells). Mike Thompson (CA-04, slug 'mike-thompson') NOT included due to a 3-way slug collision (MS state senator + CA US Rep + KS state senator share the slug); engine would mis-target the KS record (last in candidates list). Logged separately for follow-up via slug-disambig fix.

profile.background: U.S. House CA-49 since 2019. Former environmental and renewable-energy attorney. Camp Pendleton constituency drives veterans/national-security focus. Leads San Onofre nuclear-waste decommissioning task force.

mike-levin.notes_set: Sitting D, third-term. Heritage Action ~3% lifetime; SBA Pro-Life F; NARAL/RFFA 100%; HRC, Planned Parenthood, Giffords, Everytown endorse. Cross-party deviation: YES on Laken Riley Act (Jan 22 2025) — only D in San Diego, one of six in CA, drew progressive backlash; also voted to repeal 2002 Iraq AUMF and YES on multiple War Powers Resolutions (Article I restraint aligns). Voted YES on Farm Workforce Modernization Act, which includes nationwide mandatory E-Verify (partial G.3 alignment). AIPAC funding ~$300K+ per Track AIPAC; voted YES on Israel/Ukraine April 2024 supplemental.

0.note: Campaigns on 'reproductive freedom' and Roe codification; rejects fetal-personhood framing.

1.note: Voted YES on Women's Health Protection Act (HR 8296, 2022) codifying abortion; voted NO on Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act (HR 21, 2025).

2.note: No located statement on embryonic stem-cell research, IVF embryo discard, or chimeric experimentation.

3.note: No located statement on euthanasia / physician-assisted suicide / rationing.

4.note: Endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund (2024) and NARAL/Reproductive Freedom for All (2022); 100% NARAL rating.

4.note: Cosponsored Equality Act (HR 5, 2019) and Every Child Deserves a Family Act extending SOGI categories into federal civil-rights law.

profile.background: U.S. House CA-50 since 2013. Centrist Democrat; co-chair Bipartisan Fiscal Forum; member Problem Solvers Caucus and New Democrat Coalition. Environmental lawyer; former San Diego City Council. Wife runs Cameron Holdings investment firm.

scott-peters.notes_set: Sitting D centrist, seventh-term. Heritage Action ~9% lifetime; SBA Pro-Life F; 100% NARAL; 100% HRC. Cross-party deviations: FISCAL — co-chair Bipartisan Fiscal Forum, introduced 3% deficit-to-GDP target, named 'Fiscal Hero' 2018 by Campaign to Fix the Debt, introduced Responsible Budgeting Act 2025 w/ Republican Bill Huizenga; blasted Biden-era budget deals over debt concerns. WAR POWERS — supported Article I framing on Iran 2025/26 strikes. INDUSTRY-CAPTURE RED FLAG: led centrist Dem revolt against HR 3 drug-pricing bill 2021 after being top House recipient of pharma money ($88,550 in 2022 cycle); AIPAC-tracked with $150K+ pro-Israel-lobby donations.

0.note: Planned Parenthood-endorsed; 100% NARAL; campaigns on Roe codification — does not affirm personhood-from-conception.

profile.background: U.S. House CA-51 since 2021. Progressive Caucus member, Vice Chair Equality Caucus, Co-Chair Transgender Equality Task Force. Former Obama State Dept staffer. Granddaughter of Qualcomm founder Irwin Jacobs.

sara-jacobs.notes_set: Sitting D, third-term Squad-adjacent progressive. Heritage Action 0% (117th, 119th), 6% (118th); 100% PP/NARAL/HRC. Cross-party deviations cluster in foreign-policy restraint: lead sponsor Block the Bombs Act to halt offensive Israel weapons (CPC strategy); signed Pelosi letter; cosponsored Yemen War Powers Resolution; voted to repeal 2001 AUMF; J Street PAC-endorsed (no AIPAC funding — AIPAC/DMFI funded her 2020 opponent); introduced bipartisan Nunn-McCurdy Reform Act 2025 targeting DoD cost overruns (Pentagon accountability deviation). Personally pro-IVF (publicly froze her eggs); led TRICARE IVF expansion in NDAA — codes FALSE on rubric's embryo-discard cell.

profile.background: U.S. House CA-52 since 2013. Former Jesuit seminarian; devout Catholic. CA-52 includes Chula Vista, Imperial, and US-Mexico border. House Financial Services Task Force on Monetary Policy Ranking Member.

juan-vargas.notes_set: Sitting D, seventh-term. Catholic identity does NOT translate to pro-life or biblical-marriage votes: voted NO on Born-Alive Survivors Protection Act, YES on WHPA, YES on Respect for Marriage, cosponsor Equality Act + Trans Bill of Rights. CA Catholic Daily explicitly attacks him as 'pro-abortion, pro-homosexual'. Only rightward break is HAWKISH foreign-policy on Israel/Iran — one of only 4 House Ds to vote AGAINST March 2025 Iran War Powers Resolution; one of 12 Ds for $14.3B Israel aid Nov 2023. Big credibility issue: publicly DENIED AIPAC donations at Feb 2026 rally despite AIPAC being his #1 donor ~$225K total per FEC. Also defends Federal Reserve independence as Task Force Ranking Member (opposes audit/abolition).

0.note: Voted NO on Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act (HR 26, 2023) — does not affirm personhood from conception or even at live birth after attempted abortion.
